'''Thaffal''' was a [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Akk Guard]] from [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] during the [[Summertime War]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Biography==
Thaffal tried to oppose [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] when he tried to free the [[Balawai]] prisoners from the Korunnai, causing Windu to break his nose.

Near the end of the [[Summertime War]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he, the other Akk guards and [[Kar Vastor]] faced off against Windu, [[Nick Rostu]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces. During [[Battle of Pelek Baw]] Thaffal slaughtered many [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] with his [[vibroshield]]s. At the end, Rostu shot him at the knee, making him fall down, over a moribund trooper, who finally used his last effort to kill Thaffal with his [[DC-15s side arm blaster|DC-15s]] pistol.

==Appearances==
